working_crs_decision: Do not promote a Pacuare heightfield until a Costa Rica working CRS, vertical datum handling, and Unreal georeference transform are recorded.

candidate_sources.provider: Sistema Nacional de Informacion Territorial de Costa Rica
target_use: authoritative Costa Rica geospatial layer discovery
possible national orthophoto or elevation layer discovery
candidate_sources.production_gate: Record exact OGC service/layer names, CRS, access terms, attribution, and redistribution constraints before import.

candidate_sources.provider: Copernicus DEM GLO-30 Public on AWS Open Data
target_use: rainforest gorge slope and relief preview
cross-check against Costa Rica official layers
candidate_sources.production_gate: Clip, reproject, void-review, hydrologically condition, and compare against official or field-reviewed references before Unreal Landscape promotion.

target_use: SRTMGL1 fallback only after key and terms review
candidate_sources.production_gate: Register an API key, record dataset-specific terms, and keep raw pulls out of packaged content until redistribution is approved.
Use as contextual validation unless license review approves packaged derivative data.

next_actions: Inventory SNIT/IDECORI OGC services for DEM, contours, hydrography, protected areas, and orthophotos covering the Pacuare planning bounds.
Select the Pacuare working CRS and vertical datum conversion before producing any Unreal heightfield.
Clip and condition the Copernicus DEM tiles into a draft corridor heightfield, then compare slope/channel placement against official layers and guide review.
do_not_use_yet: Social media imagery as texture or training data
